ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor responsible for the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment instrument (e.g., Quiz, Assignment, Exam) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment instrument (e.g., Quizzes, Programming Assignments) */,
  "points_total" INTEGER /* Total points allocated to the assessment instrument */,
  "percentage_of_grade" REAL /* Percentage of the overall course grade allocated to the instrument */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment instrument belongs to */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment instrument */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the assessment instrument */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assessment instrument is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_instruments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment instrument the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "points_each" INTEGER /* Points allocated to each student for the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date by which the assignment must be submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assignment */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of any associated files */,
  "is_late" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is late */,
  "late_penalty" INTEGER /* Penalty for late submissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES assessment_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission is for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received by the student for the submission */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the submitted file */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  "is_late" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the submission was late */,
  "late_penalty" INTEGER /* Penalty applied for late submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment instrument the grade is for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the grade */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received by the student */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the grade is final */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  "grade_status" TEXT /* Status of the grade (e.g., Pending, Graded, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES assessment_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
